# Yunnan Vetrux — Wholesale CBD Isolate Manufacturer

> Yunnan Vetrux is a vertically integrated CBD isolate manufacturer based in Yunnan, China. We supply pharmaceutical-grade CBD isolate (≥99.5% purity, THC-free) to B2B buyers in Europe and globally via supercritical CO₂ extraction.

## What We Do
Yunnan Vetrux is a vertically integrated CBD isolate manufacturer based in Yunnan Province, China. We supply bulk pharmaceutical-grade CBD isolate (≥99.5% purity, THC-free) to B2B buyers in Europe and globally. Our facility operates at ton-scale capacity using supercritical CO₂ extraction technology.

## Core Product: CBD Isolate
- Purity: ≥99.5% (HPLC verified)
- THC: Non-detect (ND), compliant with EU Novel Food regulations
- CAS Number: 13956-29-1
- Molecular Formula: C₂₁H₃₀O₂ (314.46 g/mol)
- Appearance: White crystalline powder
- Extraction: Supercritical CO₂ (zero residual solvents)
- Packaging: 1 kg, 5 kg, 25 kg (custom ton-scale available)
- Shelf Life: 24 months
- Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, GMP, HACCP

## Quality & Compliance
- cGMP-certified manufacturing facility
- FDA 21 CFR Part 211 compliant processes
- EU GMP Annex 1 standards
- Full Certificate of Analysis (COA) with every batch
- Testing: HPLC, GC-MS, ICP-MS, USP <232>/<233>, USP <61>
- 400+ pesticide panel, mycotoxin ELISA screening
- ICH Q3C residual solvent compliance

## Manufacturing Capabilities
- 6m³ supercritical CO₂ extraction vessels (SUS316L, 45 MPa rated)
- 1,000L single-effect concentrators (200 kg/hr evaporation)
- High-purity chromatography columns (≥99.5% achievable purity)
- Multi-stage crystallization and refinement
- Ton-scale annual production capacity

## Vertical Integration
- In-house hemp cultivation base in Yunnan Province
- Controlled-environment agriculture (22°C ±0.5°C, 65–75% RH)
- Zero synthetic pesticides
- Full seed-to-isolate traceability
- ≥97% germination rate

## Target Markets
- Primary: European B2B buyers (pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, cosmetic formulators)
- Delivery terms: DDP, CIF, FOB
- Minimum order: 1 kg (ton-scale preferred)
